description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:10-alpine Docker image and caching the node_modules/ directory. Define two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a tests job that runs node -v, npm -v, npm rebuild, npm install and npm test, with a retry of 1. In the deploy stage add a publish to npmjs.com job that only runs on the master branch, retries up to 2 times, writes the NPM authentication token to ~/.npmrc, then checks if the package version in the npm registry differs from the local version and runs npm publish if so, targeting npmjs.com.
